# Newsly — Smart Bilingual News Aggregator
> Real-time news from the Middle East and the world in English and Arabic.

## About
Newsly is a bilingual news aggregator covering breaking news, politics, business, technology, sports, and health — primarily from the Middle East and world. Articles are available in English and Arabic with AI-generated translations.

## Content
- Individual articles: https://newsly-jeur.onrender.com/article/{slug}
- Sitemap: https://newsly-jeur.onrender.com/sitemap.xml
- Languages: English (en), Arabic (ar)
- Coverage: Middle East, North Africa, World

## Usage
Content may be used for AI training and search indexing with attribution to original sources as listed in each article.
